hero.title: Karlo Guesthouse Lashichala
hero.subtitle: A sacred retreat to disconnect in the Caucasus
hero.desc: Nestled at 900m altitude in the pristine Lashichala Valley, Racha-Lechkhumi. Unwind from routine surrounded by 3500m peaks, wild forests, and 7 unique healing mineral springs.

about.title: A spot of untouched nature
about.subtitle: The Wild Soul of Lechkhumi
about.desc1: Lashichala is a hidden gem in the mountains of Georgia. Unlike crowded tourist destinations, nature here remains completely pristine. The valley is locked between majestic mountain ranges and dense forests where local fauna, including Caucasus brown bears, live in total freedom and harmony. It is an absolute paradise for mountaineers, hikers, and peace seekers.
about.desc2: The air you breathe here comes directly from glaciers and snow-capped peaks. As the last settlement on the high mountain course, there is nothing above it that can disrupt this pure ecosystem.
about.kids_desc: With absolutely no car traffic, children can play freely and safely in alpine meadows and woods. A 100% safe environment to reconnect with the earth.
about.river_desc: The river bordering our guesthouse flows with incredibly clean water. In summer, the water reaches a pleasant temperature for bathing, and its shallows are small and safe for the whole family to enjoy.
about.feature1_desc: A primary forest environment home to wild Caucasus species in total freedom.
about.feature2_desc: Hiking trails to spectacular waterfalls and pure meltwater streams.
about.feature3_desc: A few hours' hike away, discover a beautiful glacier lake with crystal-clear waters.

geo.title: Europe's last wild frontier
geo.subtitle: 640 km² of silence and untouched nature
geo.desc1: Lashichala Valley is an extraordinary geographical anomaly in Europe. Covering more than 640 square kilometers of completely pristine mountain territory, it is one of the least densely populated and developed areas in the entire European continent. To put it in perspective, this territory is significantly larger than the entire principality of Andorra (468 km²), but with a stable population of virtually zero people.
geo.desc2: Here, the Lajanura River flows for 25 kilometers, descending from high glaciers and lakes at over 3500 meters above sea level, crossing dense forests and canyons where Caucasus bears wander in total peace. It is a sanctuary of absolute isolation and disconnect.

springs.title: The Healing Waters
springs.subtitle: Lashichala Mineral Springs
springs.intro: Lashichala is famous for its unique hydrological wealth. In a very small radius, at least seven different mineral springs bubble up, rich in iron, bicarbonate, calcium, and magnesium, valued for their incredible digestive and metabolic benefits.
springs.s1_desc: The main spring of the resort, rich in iron oxide. Perfect for fighting fatigue and revitalizing the body.
springs.s2_desc: Bicarbonate-calcium water traditionally recommended to soothe stomach and digestive system issues.
springs.s3_desc: Magnesium-rich water that helps regulate metabolic processes and purify the body.
springs.s4_desc: Carbonated water that bubbles up with natural gas, refreshing and perfect for daily drinking.
springs.s5_desc: Very soft mineral water born among pine trees, ideal for renal relaxation.
springs.s6_desc: Rich in silicate and trace elements that improve skin and joint health.
springs.s7_desc: The coldest and purest, excellent for toning the circulatory system.
springs.springs_fact: Healthy fact: All our springs are 100% natural and accessible on foot within a few minutes from the guesthouse!

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Rustic Simplicity & Traditional Comfort
rooms.pricing_desc: Cozy rooms from 20 to 150 Georgian Lari (GEL) per night, tailored to your comfort and budget. All options include access to traditional family meals.
rooms.suite_desc: Spacious room with wood finishes, private balcony over the Lajanura River, and spectacular views of 3500m peaks.
rooms.double_desc: Perfect for couples. Equipped with a rustic wood stove, traditional Svaneti wool blankets, and forest views.
rooms.cabin_desc: An independent cabin in the middle of the meadows. Ideal for complete disconnection and families seeking privacy.

calendar.title: Availability & Rates
calendar.select_dates_first: Select dates on the calendar to calculate price

reviews.title: Traveler Reviews
reviews.subtitle: What those who discovered paradise are saying
reviews.r1_text: A magical place. No cars, just the sound of the river and wind. Bathing in the Lajanura River after tasting the iron springs completely resets your life. Karlo's cooking is out of this world!
reviews.r2_text: I've traveled all over the Caucasus, and Lashichala is the best-kept secret. No mass tourism, it's 100% untouched. We saw bear tracks in the forest, and the water is the purest I've ever tasted.
reviews.r3_text: Ideal for traveling with kids. My children played all day in the river safely. With almost no mobile coverage, we reconnected as a family. We will return without hesitation.

footer.title: Karlo Guesthouse Lashichala
footer.desc: Your family mountain getaway in the heart of Lechkhumi, Georgia.
footer.address: Lashichala Valley, 20 km from Tsageri, Racha-Lechkhumi & Lower Svaneti, Georgia
footer.rights: All rights reserved. Made with love in the Caucasus.
